name: @ai-arena/okx-payment-proxy
description: Reverse-proxy that pay-walls POST /v1/okx/create-agent via OKX's Onchain OS Payments (mppx + @okxweb3/mpp), per docs/okx/create-agent-endpoint.md. NOT deployed yet — see README.md for why. Pure ESM (its only deps are ESM-only), unlike the rest of this monorepo's services.
